title: 不管...都 (no matter...still)
pattern: 不管 + condition + 都/也 + result
explanation: Used to express that the result holds true regardless of circumstances. The clause after 不管 presents various possibilities, while 都/也 introduces the unchanged outcome.

examples.simplified: 不管天气怎么样，我都会去。
examples.traditional: 不管天氣怎麼樣，我都會去。
examples.pinyin: Bùguǎn tiānqì zěnmeyàng, wǒ dōu huì qù.
examples.english: No matter what the weather is like, I will still go.

examples.simplified: 不管多么困难，他都不放弃。
examples.traditional: 不管多麼困難，他都不放棄。
examples.pinyin: Bùguǎn duōme kùnnán, tā dōu bù fàngqì.
examples.english: No matter how difficult it is, he never gives up.

fillBlanks.english: No matter what the weather is like, I will still go.

fillBlanks.sentence: 不管多么困难，他___不放弃。
fillBlanks.english: No matter how difficult it is, he never gives up.
No matter whether you go or not, I will go.

mcqSentences.correct: 不管发生什么，我都支持你。
wrong: 不管发生什么，我才支持你。
因为发生什么，我都支持你。
不管发生什么，我就支持你。
mcqSentences.english: No matter what happens, I will support you.

title: 只要...就 (as long as...then)
explanation: Expresses that the result will follow as long as the stated condition is met. It sets a sufficient condition for the outcome.

examples.simplified: 只要你努力，就能成功。
examples.traditional: 只要你努力，就能成功。
examples.pinyin: Zhǐyào nǐ nǔlì, jiù néng chénggōng.
examples.english: As long as you work hard, you will succeed.

examples.simplified: 只要有时间，我就去看你。
examples.traditional: 只要有時間，我就去看你。
examples.pinyin: Zhǐyào yǒu shíjiān, wǒ jiù qù kàn nǐ.
examples.english: As long as I have time, I will come to see you.

fillBlanks.english: As long as you work hard, you will succeed.
As long as I have time, I will come to see you.

fillBlanks.sentence: 只要天气好，我们___去爬山。
fillBlanks.english: As long as the weather is good, we will go hiking.

wrong: 只要你来，我都高兴。
不管你来，我就高兴。
只要你来，我才高兴。
mcqSentences.english: As long as you come, I will be happy.

title: 连...都/也 (even)
explanation: Used to emphasize an extreme or unexpected case. 连 highlights the subject or object as the most surprising example, and 都/也 reinforces the inclusiveness.

examples.simplified: 连小孩子都会做这道题。
examples.traditional: 連小孩子都會做這道題。
examples.pinyin: Lián xiǎo háizi dōu huì zuò zhè dào tí.
examples.english: Even small children can solve this problem.

examples.simplified: 他忙得连饭都没时间吃。
examples.traditional: 他忙得連飯都沒時間吃。
examples.pinyin: Tā máng de lián fàn dōu méi shíjiān chī.
examples.english: He is so busy that he doesn't even have time to eat.

fillBlanks.english: Even small children can solve this problem.
He is so busy that he doesn't even have time to eat.
Even she doesn't know the answer.

mcqSentences.correct: 连我妈妈都不知道这件事。
wrong: 连我妈妈才不知道这件事。
虽然我妈妈都不知道这件事。
连我妈妈就不知道这件事。
mcqSentences.english: Even my mother doesn't know about this.

title: 既然...就 (since...then)
pattern: 既然 + established fact + 就 + conclusion/suggestion
explanation: Used when drawing a logical conclusion or making a suggestion based on an already established or acknowledged fact. The 既然 clause presents the accepted premise.

examples.simplified: 既然你来了，就留下来吃饭吧。
examples.traditional: 既然你來了，就留下來吃飯吧。
examples.pinyin: Jìrán nǐ lái le, jiù liú xià lái chī fàn ba.
examples.english: Since you're already here, stay and have dinner.

examples.simplified: 既然决定了，就不要后悔。
examples.traditional: 既然決定了，就不要後悔。
examples.pinyin: Jìrán juédìng le, jiù bùyào hòuhuǐ.
examples.english: Since you've already decided, don't regret it.

fillBlanks.english: Since you're already here, stay and have dinner.
Since you've already decided, don't regret it.

fillBlanks.sentence: 既然你不喜欢，___不要勉强。
fillBlanks.english: Since you don't like it, then don't force yourself.

mcqSentences.correct: 既然你知道了，就告诉我吧。
wrong: 既然你知道了，才告诉我吧。
因为你知道了，就告诉我吧。
既然你知道了，都告诉我吧。
mcqSentences.english: Since you already know, tell me.

title: 宁可...也不 (would rather...than)
pattern: 宁可 + preferred option + 也不 + rejected option
explanation: Expresses a preference for one option over another, even if the preferred option is difficult or undesirable. The speaker chooses the lesser of two evils.

examples.simplified: 我宁可走路，也不坐公共汽车。
examples.traditional: 我寧可走路，也不坐公共汽車。
examples.pinyin: Wǒ nìngkě zǒulù, yě bù zuò gōnggòng qìchē.
examples.english: I would rather walk than take the bus.

examples.simplified: 她宁可饿着，也不吃那种食物。
examples.traditional: 她寧可餓著，也不吃那種食物。
examples.pinyin: Tā nìngkě è zhe, yě bù chī nà zhǒng shíwù.
examples.english: She would rather go hungry than eat that kind of food.

fillBlanks.sentence: 我___走路，也不坐公共汽车。
fillBlanks.english: I would rather walk than take the bus.

fillBlanks.sentence: 他宁可自己做，___请别人帮忙。
fillBlanks.english: He would rather do it himself than ask others for help.

fillBlanks.sentence: 我宁可早起，___错过这次机会。
fillBlanks.english: I would rather get up early than miss this opportunity.

mcqSentences.correct: 我宁可一个人住，也不跟陌生人同住。
wrong: 我宁可一个人住，才不跟陌生人同住。
我虽然一个人住，也不跟陌生人同住。
我宁可一个人住，都不跟陌生人同住。
mcqSentences.english: I would rather live alone than share with a stranger.

title: 是...的 (emphasis on circumstances)
explanation: Used to emphasize the time, place, manner, or reason of a completed action. The action itself is assumed to have happened; the focus is on its circumstances.

examples.simplified: 他是坐飞机来的。
examples.traditional: 他是坐飛機來的。
examples.pinyin: Tā shì zuò fēijī lái de.
examples.english: He came by airplane. (emphasis on the mode of transport)

examples.simplified: 这本书是在图书馆买的。
examples.traditional: 這本書是在圖書館買的。
examples.pinyin: Zhè běn shū shì zài túshūguǎn mǎi de.
examples.english: This book was bought at the library. (emphasis on the location)

fillBlanks.english: He came by airplane.
This book was bought at the library.
She left yesterday. (emphasis on when)

wrong: 我在北京出生是的。
我是在北京出生了。
我都在北京出生的。
mcqSentences.english: I was born in Beijing. (emphasis on location)

title: 越...越 (the more...the more)
explanation: Expresses that as one quality or action increases, another quality or action increases proportionally. Both clauses can share the same or different subjects.

examples.simplified: 越学越有意思。
examples.traditional: 越學越有意思。
examples.pinyin: Yuè xué yuè yǒu yìsi.
examples.english: The more you study, the more interesting it becomes.

examples.simplified: 天气越来越冷了。
examples.traditional: 天氣越來越冷了。
examples.pinyin: Tiānqì yuè lái yuè lěng le.
examples.english: The weather is getting colder and colder.

fillBlanks.english: The more you study, the more interesting it becomes.
The more he talks, the less I understand.
The food here is getting more and more expensive.

wrong: 这本书很读很有意思。
这本书越读都有意思。
这本书读越越有意思。
mcqSentences.english: The more you read this book, the more interesting it gets.

title: 一...就 (as soon as)
pattern: subject + 一 + verb1 + 就 + verb2
explanation: Expresses that one action happens immediately after another. The two events are closely linked in time, with the second following the first without delay.

examples.simplified: 他一回家就开始工作。
examples.traditional: 他一回家就開始工作。
examples.pinyin: Tā yī huíjiā jiù kāishǐ gōngzuò.
examples.english: As soon as he gets home, he starts working.

examples.simplified: 我一看见她就笑了。
examples.traditional: 我一看見她就笑了。
examples.pinyin: Wǒ yī kànjiàn tā jiù xiào le.
examples.english: As soon as I saw her, I laughed.

fillBlanks.english: As soon as he gets home, he starts working.
As soon as he gets home, he starts working.
As soon as she heard the news, she cried.

mcqSentences.correct: 我一到家就给你打电话。
wrong: 我到家一就给你打电话。
我一到家才给你打电话。
我一到家都给你打电话。
mcqSentences.english: As soon as I get home, I will call you.

title: 不仅...还/也 (not only...but also)
pattern: 不仅 + quality/action + 还/也 + additional quality/action
explanation: Used to add extra information beyond what is already stated, expressing that the subject possesses more than one quality or performs more than one action.

examples.simplified: 她不仅聪明，还很努力。
examples.traditional: 她不僅聰明，還很努力。
examples.pinyin: Tā bùjǐn cōngmíng, hái hěn nǔlì.
examples.english: She is not only smart but also very hardworking.

examples.simplified: 这家餐厅不仅价格便宜，菜也很好吃。
examples.traditional: 這家餐廳不僅價格便宜，菜也很好吃。
examples.pinyin: Zhè jiā cāntīng bùjǐn jiàgé piányí, cài yě hěn hǎochī.
examples.english: This restaurant is not only cheap but the food also tastes great.

fillBlanks.english: She is not only smart but also very hardworking.

fillBlanks.sentence: 他不仅会说中文，___会说日语。
fillBlanks.english: He can not only speak Chinese but also Japanese.

fillBlanks.sentence: 这本书不仅有趣，___很有教育意义。
fillBlanks.english: This book is not only interesting but also very educational.

mcqSentences.correct: 他不仅学习好，体育也很棒。
wrong: 他不仅学习好，体育就很棒。
他虽然学习好，体育也很棒。
他不仅学习好，体育才很棒。
mcqSentences.english: He is not only good at studying but also great at sports.

title: 因为...所以 (because...therefore)
pattern: 因为 + cause + 所以 + result
explanation: A common cause-and-effect structure. 因为 introduces the reason or cause, while 所以 introduces the result or consequence. Either conjunction can be omitted but not both.

examples.simplified: 因为下雨，所以我们取消了计划。
examples.traditional: 因為下雨，所以我們取消了計劃。
examples.pinyin: Yīnwèi xià yǔ, suǒyǐ wǒmen qǔxiāo le jìhuà.
examples.english: Because it rained, we cancelled our plans.

examples.simplified: 因为他生病了，所以没来上课。
examples.traditional: 因為他生病了，所以沒來上課。
examples.pinyin: Yīnwèi tā shēngbìng le, suǒyǐ méi lái shàngkè.
examples.english: Because he was sick, he didn't come to class.

fillBlanks.english: Because it rained, we cancelled our plans.

fillBlanks.sentence: 因为他生病了，___没来上课。
fillBlanks.english: Because he was sick, he didn't come to class.

fillBlanks.sentence: 因为路上堵车，___我迟到了。
fillBlanks.english: Because there was traffic, I was late.

mcqSentences.correct: 因为天气太热，所以我不想出门。
wrong: 因为天气太热，才我不想出门。
因为天气太热，都我不想出门。
虽然天气太热，所以我不想出门。
mcqSentences.english: Because the weather is too hot, I don't want to go out.

title: 对...来说 (for...speaking)
explanation: Used to express a perspective or judgment from a particular person's or group's point of view. It introduces whose viewpoint is being expressed.

examples.simplified: 对我来说，学习汉语很重要。
examples.traditional: 對我來說，學習漢語很重要。
examples.pinyin: Duì wǒ lái shuō, xuéxí Hànyǔ hěn zhòngyào.
examples.english: For me, learning Chinese is very important.

examples.simplified: 对孩子们来说，玩是最快乐的事。
examples.traditional: 對孩子們來說，玩是最快樂的事。
examples.pinyin: Duì háizimen lái shuō, wán shì zuì kuàilè de shì.
examples.english: For children, playing is the happiest thing.

fillBlanks.english: For me, learning Chinese is very important.
For me, this problem is very simple.

fillBlanks.sentence: 对学生___，考试是很大的压力。
fillBlanks.english: For students, exams are a lot of pressure.

mcqSentences.correct: 对她来说，家庭是最重要的。
wrong: 对她说来，家庭是最重要的。
从她来说，家庭是最重要的。
对于她说，家庭是最重要的。
mcqSentences.english: For her, family is the most important thing.

title: 无论...都 (no matter...all)
pattern: 无论 + question word/A还是B + 都/也 + result
explanation: Similar to 不管, 无论 expresses that the result remains unchanged regardless of any condition. It is slightly more formal in tone than 不管.

examples.simplified: 无论发生什么，我都支持你。
examples.traditional: 無論發生什麼，我都支持你。
examples.pinyin: Wúlùn fāshēng shénme, wǒ dōu zhīchí nǐ.
examples.english: No matter what happens, I will support you.

examples.simplified: 无论你在哪里，我都会想你。
examples.traditional: 無論你在哪裡，我都會想你。
examples.pinyin: Wúlùn nǐ zài nǎlǐ, wǒ dōu huì xiǎng nǐ.
examples.english: No matter where you are, I will miss you.

fillBlanks.english: No matter what happens, I will support you.

fillBlanks.sentence: 无论你在哪里，我___会想你。
fillBlanks.english: No matter where you are, I will miss you.

fillBlanks.sentence: 无论多难，他___要完成任务。
fillBlanks.english: No matter how difficult, he must complete the task.

mcqSentences.correct: 无论刮风还是下雨，他都按时上班。
wrong: 无论刮风还是下雨，他才按时上班。
虽然刮风还是下雨，他都按时上班。
无论刮风还是下雨，他就按时上班。
mcqSentences.english: No matter if it's windy or raining, he goes to work on time.

title: 万一 (in case/what if)
pattern: 万一 + unlikely negative scenario + consequence/advice
explanation: Used to raise an unlikely but possible negative scenario, often as a warning or precaution. It implies a low-probability event that one should prepare for.

examples.simplified: 万一你迷路了，给我打电话。
examples.traditional: 萬一你迷路了，給我打電話。
examples.pinyin: Wànyī nǐ mílù le, gěi wǒ dǎ diànhuà.
examples.english: In case you get lost, give me a call.

examples.simplified: 带把伞吧，万一下雨呢。
examples.traditional: 帶把傘吧，萬一下雨呢。
examples.pinyin: Dài bǎ sǎn ba, wànyī xià yǔ ne.
examples.english: Take an umbrella, just in case it rains.

fillBlanks.english: In case you get lost, give me a call.
Take some money, in case you need it.
What if he doesn't come, what should we do?

mcqSentences.correct: 万一考试不及格，你有什么计划？
wrong: 因为考试不及格，你有什么计划？
虽然考试不及格，你有什么计划？
所以考试不及格，你有什么计划？
mcqSentences.english: What if you fail the exam, what is your plan?

title: 把 (disposal construction)
explanation: The 把 construction moves the object before the verb to emphasize what happens to it. It is used when an action has a definite result or effect on the object, often involving displacement or change of state.

examples.simplified: 请把书放在桌子上。
examples.traditional: 請把書放在桌子上。
examples.pinyin: Qǐng bǎ shū fàng zài zhuōzi shàng.
examples.english: Please put the book on the table.

examples.simplified: 他把作业做完了。
examples.traditional: 他把作業做完了。
examples.pinyin: Tā bǎ zuòyè zuò wán le.
examples.english: He finished (doing) the homework.

fillBlanks.english: Please put the book on the table.
He finished doing the homework.
Please close the door.

wrong: 请打开把窗户。
请把窗户打。
请窗户把打开。

title: 趁 (take advantage of/while)
explanation: Expresses seizing an opportunity while favorable conditions exist. It urges action before the opportunity passes, often implying urgency or timeliness.

examples.simplified: 趁现在天气好，我们去公园吧。
examples.traditional: 趁現在天氣好，我們去公園吧。
examples.pinyin: Chèn xiànzài tiānqì hǎo, wǒmen qù gōngyuán ba.
examples.english: While the weather is nice now, let's go to the park.

examples.simplified: 趁年轻，多学点东西。
examples.traditional: 趁年輕，多學點東西。
examples.pinyin: Chèn niánqīng, duō xué diǎn dōngxi.
examples.english: While you're young, learn more things.

fillBlanks.english: While the weather is nice now, let's go to the park.
While you're young, learn more things.
While we have time, let's have a chat.

mcqSentences.correct: 趁热打铁，我们赶紧完成这个项目。
wrong: 因为热打铁，我们赶紧完成这个项目。
趁热打铁，我们才完成这个项目。
虽然热打铁，我们赶紧完成这个项目。
mcqSentences.english: Strike while the iron is hot—let's hurry and complete this project.
